creator: jose@we.lc.ehu.es
text:
The galeon-0.11.3 port fails to build after mozilla was updated to 0.9.3.

Fix: 

Update galeon port to 0.12pre1. Unfortunately, the new version is quite
different from 0.11.3. I built it by hand and crashes continuously
with segmentation faults, need gconf, and mozilla preferences are
not saved. Weird.
How-To-Repeat: 
Try to build www/galeon :-)
